calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Petitioner: Jose M. Palacios, present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Julian Antonio Chavez-Mejia, and with Spanish Interpreter: Brulio Ruiz.
Objections to the proposed Name Change of the minor were made at the hearing by the Minor's Mother: Carla Chavez.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony by the parties, the Petition for Name Change of a Minor is DENIED without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Reset To Feb-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Petitioner: Jose M. Palacios, present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the Minor: Julian Antonio Chavez-Mejia.
Objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing by the Minor's Mother: Carla Chavez.
Matter is continued to Feb. 27, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for the Petitioner to bring an Interpreter.
